name: Globex Mining Enterprises Inc.
description: Globex Mining Enterprises Inc. is a Canadian exploration, evaluation, and development company with a diversified portfolio of mid-stage mineral properties in North America. The company operates under a project generator business model, acquiring properties, enhancing their value through exploration, and then optioning, joint-venturing, or selling them to third parties while retaining royalties. Its extensive portfolio includes gold, copper, zinc, silver, nickel, platinum, palladium, and various industrial minerals.
